title: Linociera sleumeri

taxonomy: Linociera sleumeri is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to New Guinea. The plant is classified within the genus Linociera, which belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The Sapindaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the soapberry family.
